createUser.description: Create user and skip first-login setup wizard
createUser.script: sudo -S dscl . -create /Users/testuser && sudo -S dscl . -create /Users/testuser UserShell /bin/bash && sudo -S dscl . -create /Users/testuser RealName 'Test User' && sudo -S dscl . -create /Users/testuser UniqueID 1001 && sudo -S dscl . -create /Users/testuser PrimaryGroupID 20 && sudo -S dscl . -create /Users/testuser NFSHomeDirectory /Users/testuser && sudo -S dscl . -passwd /Users/testuser 'TestPassword123' && sudo -S createhomedir -c -u testuser && sudo -S defaults write /Users/testuser/Library/Preferences/com.apple.SetupAssistant DidSeeCloudSetup -bool TRUE && sudo -S defaults write /Users/testuser/Library/Preferences/com.apple.SetupAssistant GestureMovieSeen none && sudo -S defaults write /Users/testuser/Library/Preferences/com.apple.SetupAssistant LastSeenCloudProductVersion 15.0 && sudo -S chown testuser /Users/testuser/Library/Preferences/com.apple.SetupAssistant.plist && echo 'User created successfully'

deleteUser.script: sudo -S dscl . -delete /Users/testuser && sudo -S rm -rf /Users/testuser && echo 'User deleted successfully'

changeWallpaper.description: Change wallpaper for currently logged in user
changeWallpaper.script: curl -L -o /tmp/wallpaper.jpg 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/1e/Stonehenge.jpg/1920px-Stonehenge.jpg' && LOGGED_USER=$(stat -f '%Su' /dev/console) && USER_ID=$(id -u $LOGGED_USER) && sudo -S launchctl asuser $USER_ID sudo -u $LOGGED_USER osascript -e 'tell application "Finder" to set desktop picture to POSIX file "/tmp/wallpaper.jpg"' && echo 'Wallpaper changed successfully'
